reviews.comment:
La 5ta vez que voy, la 5ta vez que no anda wifi. Para colmo, cuando les pedimos que reinicien el modem las chicas nos dicen "pero a mí me anda"...

(Translated by Google)
This is the 5th time I've been here, and the 5th time the Wi-Fi hasn't worked. To make matters worse, when we ask them to restart the modem, the girls tell us, "But it works for me"...

reviewReply.comment: Gracias x el comentario estuvimos con problemas con el proveedor pero últimamente estamos sin inconvenientes salvo pequeños cortes le pedimos mil disculpas

reviews.comment:
Larguísimas colas y más largas aún la cara de los playeros..te atienden a desgano aún siendo socio…le tenes que pedir que te limpien el vidrio y te lo limpian con mala cara…ni hablar de revisar el aceite o el agua…mucho mejor te atienden en Palermo…siempre que no se les caiga el sistema…

(Translated by Google)
Extremely long queues and even longer faces from the attendants...they serve you reluctantly even if you're a member...you have to ask them to clean your windshield and they do it with a sour face...don't even think about checking your oil or water...you get much better service in Palermo...as long as their system doesn't crash...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtOWNyOGhnRRAB
